description: A graphic with a color photograph of a smiling young woman with long dark hair wearing a light blue top, photographed outdoors with a blurred background. Large white text across the lower portion reads 'THIS IS OUR WHY' and 'LAKEN RILEY', with 'NATIONAL CRIME VICTIMS WEEK' below and a small DHS seal at the bottom.
notable_text: THIS IS OUR WHY; LAKEN RILEY; NATIONAL CRIME VICTIMS WEEK
